data.description:
## What
Port ticket_tag / ticket_untag (ticket-lib-api.sh) to rebar._commands behind REBAR_LEAF_WRITES. Unlike comment/file-impact/verify-commands these are NOT pure single-event appends: they delegate to _tag_add_checked / _tag_remove which read current tag state (reduce) and dedup before emitting. Port must reproduce: dedup (adding an existing tag is a no-op / same exit), removing an absent tag's behavior, and the exact TAG/EDIT event shape.

Files: src/rebar/_commands/leaf.py (or a tags.py sibling), src/rebar/_engine/rebar (tag/untag arms), src/rebar/__init__.py (tag/untag).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tag/untag ported, switch-wired at dispatcher + library
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-ticket-tag.sh green against REBAR_LEAF_WRITES=bash AND =python
- [ ] dedup + absent-tag-removal parity preserved (byte-identical state)
- [ ] Default remains bash
data.title: Tier B: port tag/untag to rebar._commands (state-reading leaf writes)
